prospects.notes: Berkeley Biophysics PhD student, age 21. Zillow application approved 04/12. Lease signed. Term: Aug 1 2026–Jul 31 2027, $1,650/mo, $1,650 deposit. Room A (King) filled.

prospects.name: Niokhor Dione
prospects.notes: New Zillow lead. TOUR REQUESTED. Replied to on Zillow today ("Hi Niokhor, thanks for your interest in 2322 Stu..."). 0/2 screening match on Zillow. Awaiting response.

prospects.name: J T
prospects.notes: UC Berkeley graduate student. Messaged 04/09. Was unreplied for 3 days during SpareRoom lockout. REPLIED 04/12 (SpareRoom "Not Replied To" = 0 as of evening sweep). STRONG fit — Berkeley grad student. Awaiting reply.

prospects.name: Diego Aranda
prospects.notes: Messaged 04/08. Was unreplied for 4 days during SpareRoom lockout. REPLIED 04/12 (SpareRoom "Not Replied To" = 0 as of evening sweep). Awaiting reply.

prospects.name: Kris
prospects.notes: Messaged 04/11. Couple (ages 20, 18). REPLIED 04/12 (SpareRoom "Not Replied To" = 0 as of evening sweep). May not fit single-room rental. Awaiting reply.

prospects.name: Thomas Thuillier
prospects.notes: Senior scientist at Lawrence Berkeley Lab (staff scientist). French, age 55. Seeking shared house for 1 year (wife joins Aug 2027). REPLIED 04/06 12:36 AM via Yahoo Mail to CL relay. No response after 6 days. Phone: 510-365-5300. Archived by evening sweep 04/12 per >5-day stale rule. EXCELLENT fit if re-engages — Mike can nudge via direct text.
prospects.actionNeeded: Reply with screening confirmation and tour scheduling. Thomas is an excellent prospect — LBL staff scientist = very stable income, quiet/respectful, seeking 1-year lease. Suggest Friday evening tour if Mike is back in Berkeley.

prospects.name: Jan Schütte-Engel
prospects.notes: Postdoc at UC Berkeley. REPLIED 04/08 clarifying room details. 5+ days no reply — archived 04/13 morning sweep. Phone: 217-904-8944. Worth a direct text nudge if Mike wants to re-engage.

prospects.name: Julius
prospects.notes: Berkeley PhD student. Friday 04/10 tour CANCELLED — Mike's flight delayed. Mike texted rescheduling options (mornings before work, through Wed). Julius replied "Ok, I have to see for tomorrow, will lyk" then "If not. I'm in town through weds. Avail in the mornings before work." No further messages since 04/10 (5 days). STRONG fit — needs nudge from Mike to reschedule.

prospects.name: Mohamed
prospects.notes: Asked "Hi, is this available?" Mike replied "Yes, are you interested?" (Mon 14:41). No response (1 day). Minimal info — needs screening if re-engages.

prospects.name: Neel Mokaria
prospects.notes: UMD student coming to SF for work June 1-Aug 15. Wants to share room with girlfriend. DISQUALIFIED: short-term (2.5 months vs 12-month lease), two occupants, wrong dates (not Aug 1). Polite decline sent 04/15 midday via FB Messenger. Neel replied 04/15 04:13 "I worries thanks" (acknowledging decline). Closed.

prospects.name: Christian
prospects.notes: Asked about availability, bathroom (shared), both rooms. Said "I'm interested in its location." Mike gave cross streets (Telegraph & Stuart). No reply in 3 days. Joined Facebook 2026. Limited profile info.

prospects.name: Prakhar
prospects.notes: Works near Union Square in SF, planning to commute via BART. Mike told him Ashby BART is down the street. Asked for address (Fri), Mike gave cross streets. "Yes planning to commute." No screening info collected (profession, lease duration, move-in date). 4 days no reply after Mike's last message. Needs follow-up.

prospects.name: Jack Boyd
prospects.notes: Incoming Berkeley grad student. Currently back east. Mike proposed Sunday 04/12 virtual tour on 04/06 — 9 days with no confirmed reply (iMessage blocked). Archived per >7-day stale rule. Phone: 805-453-2989. Worth a direct text if Mike wants to re-engage.

scheduled.notes: Incoming Berkeley grad student, back east. Mike proposed Sunday 04/12 on 04/06 — 7 days no confirmed reply visible (iMessage blocked). Likely stale — needs nudge or archive soon.

completed.outcome: RESCHEDULING — Tour did NOT happen at 11am. Julian messaged ready at 10:16 AM PT; Mike replied 11:27 AM PT asking Julian to text 714-612-0723 to do FaceTime/Zoom later today. Julian saw message. Pending reschedule for later today 04/12.
CANCELLED — Mike's flight delayed. Rescheduling attempted via iMessage but stalled since 04/10. Julius available mornings before work, in town through Wed. Mike: nudge to reschedule.
